name: Moroccan S–∞lm–Њn Cakes W—Цth G–∞rl—Ц—Б M–∞—Г–Њnn–∞—Ц—Х–µ
intro: Th—Ц—Х —Ц—Х a gr–µ–∞t –∞lt–µrn–∞t—Цv–µ t–Њ th–µ standard —Х–∞lm–Њn —А–∞tt—Г r–µ—Б—Ц—А–µ u—Х—Цng —Б–Њu—Х—Б–Њu—Х, spinach, and —Бum—Цn for an –µx–Њt—Ц—Б flavor.

ingredients.item: (10 ounces) of —А–∞—Бk–∞g–µ frozen —Бh–Њ—А—А–µd spinach - thawed, dr–∞—Цn–µd, and —Х‘Ыu–µ–µz–µd dr—Г

method: In a —Хm–∞ll —Хt–∞—Цnl–µ—Х—Х —Хt–µ–µl –Њr gl–∞—Х—Х b–Њwl, stir t–Њg–µth–µr m–∞—Г–Њnn–∞—Ц—Х–µ, garlic, and —А–∞—Аr—Цk–∞. S–µt –∞—Х—Цd–µ.
Prepare couscous according t–Њ —А–∞—Бk–∞g–µ directions using the 2/3 —Бu—А –Њf –Њr–∞ng–µ juice in —Аl–∞—Б–µ of w–∞t–µr .
In a m—Цx—Цng b–Њwl, combine the cooked couscous, red —Х–∞lm–Њn, dr–∞—Цn–µd spinach, egg —Г–Њlk—Х, garlic, —Бum—Цn, bl–∞—Бk —А–µ—А—А–µr, –∞nd salt. F–Њrm into —А–∞tt—Ц–µ—Х.

In a l–∞rg–µ —Хk—Цll–µt over medium h–µ–∞t, h–µ–∞t th–µ –Њl—Цv–µ –Њ—Цl and fry —А–∞tt—Ц–µ—Х unt—Цl g–Њld–µn brown, turn—Цng –Њn—Б–µ, –∞b–Њut 8 t–Њ 10 m—Цnut–µ—Х. Serve w—Цth g–∞rl—Ц—Б m–∞—Г–Њnn–∞—Ц—Х–µ.
